name: TildaZ Drop-down
description: Places the TildaZ terminal (Wayland app_id=tildaz) as a drop-down window. Cinnamon on Wayland only — muffin has no wlr-layer-shell, so placement must be done from the shell process (this extension), mirroring the GNOME Shell extension. See https://github.com/ensky0/tildaz issue #229.
